<|3.22|> We are not islands unto ourselves.<|6.50|>
<|7.68|> God has created us and our hearts for community.<|11.84|>
<|13.56|> And daily, we are being shaped for living in community.<|18.70|>
<|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> We are being held accountable for our baptismal covenant of honoring the dignity of every human being.<|7.86|>
